listings.description: Welcome to 118 Alpine Dr. Walk into the main level with 2 story foyer, newer Brazilian hardwood, large family room with surround sound speakers off updated kitchen with quartz counters, new refrigerator and large island. Living room with crown molding, dining room with crown molding and shadow boxing. Great office space if working from home. Upper level has 4 bedrooms and 2 full baths. The primary bedroom has walking closet, gas fireplace, sitting room with wet bar and tray ceiling. The lower level has a media room, workshop and lots of finished open space. Large Trek deck on back. Easy access to Rt. 15/7 and Dulles Toll Rd. Lots of nearby restaurants and shopping.

Beautiful 4-Bedroom single family home for sale in the heart of Leesburg! Featuring over 3,000 finished square feet, this bright and open floor plan sits on a premium lot backing to trees for added privacy. Fresh paint throughout many areas gives the home a clean, updated feel. The main level offers an open-concept layout with a spacious kitchen featuring a granite breakfast bar and upgraded appliances that flows seamlessly into the family room and sunroom. You'll also find a traditional dining room and a main-level office, perfect for working from home. Step outside to a custom stone stairway leading to the patio and private backyard surrounded by trees. Upstairs, the primary suite features hardwood flooring, a walk-in closet, and a luxurious bath with dual vanities, a corner soaking tub, and separate shower. Three additional spacious bedrooms include two with walk-in closets, along with a full hallway bath and convenient bedroom-level laundry with front-load washer and dryer. The huge unfinished walk-up basement offers endless possibilities for a home gym, workshop, or additional storage. Conveniently located just minutes from Historic Downtown Leesburg's shops, restaurants, and top-rated schools. Don't miss this opportunity - schedule your tour online today!

Tucked along the most coveted street in Historic Downtown Leesburg, this is a rare and remarkable opportunity to restore and reimagine a piece of local history. Set on prestigious Cornwall Street in NW Leesburg - just moments from the boutiques, restaurants, coffee shops, and community life of downtown - this historic residence is waiting for its next passionate steward. For the buyer who reveres historic architecture and understands the irreplaceable value of location, character, and craftsmanship, this property offers extraordinary potential. The home is being sold AS-IS with thoughtfully designed architectural plans already approved by the Town of Leesburg's Board of Architectural Review (BAR), saving the next owner significant time, expense, and uncertainty. The approved plans expand the residence from approximately 1,840 to over 3,000 finished square feet and envision a beautifully livable historic home with four bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a gracious primary suite, and a modern kitchen flowing seamlessly into open family and dining spaces. Additional features include a screened porch, mudroom, laundry room, and detached two-car garage with driveway parking - all carefully designed to honor the home's historic integrity while elevating everyday living. Extensive groundwork has already been completed by the current owner, including over $100,000 invested in architectural planning, BAR approval, site clearing, tree removal, exterior restoration, lead-safe paint remediation, debris removal, and preparation for renovation. The non-historic addition to the guest house has also been removed to better preserve the property's architectural authenticity. This is not a project for the faint of heart - but for the visionary buyer, the reward is the opportunity to create something truly exceptional on one of Leesburg's most treasured streets. Please note: Located within Leesburg's Historic District, exterior modifications to the home remain subject to BAR approval. Interior renovations are at the discretion of the homeowner. The home may not be demolished. Listing price is below tax-assessed value. Cash buyers preferred. Showings by appointment only with proof of funds. Serious inquiries only. *All information deemed reliable but not guaranteed. All measurements and data should be independently verified by the buyer* Owner is agent.

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

Coming Soon in the heart of Leesburg! Unique timeline, see notes at the bottom. This updated Rambler makes main level living easy: 3 bedrooms on the main floor and a 4th in the fully finished basement. Fenced-in 0.23 acre yard backing to the woods of Leesburg's newest park: Westpark (soon to be a frisbee park and nature reserve!) All major systems new! Water heater, fence, and ceiling fans installed in 2025. Porch, deck, and kitchen oven redone in 2024. Roof, HVAC, and windows replaced in 2022. No HOA! The sellers are under contract on new construction with a close estimated between November 2026 and January 2027. The sellers are looking for an offer with a long close and rent back in order to sync up with this timeline.

BEAUTIFUL COLONIAL IN SOUGHT AFTER KINCAID FOREST. THIS HOME HAS 4 BEDROOMS, THREE AND A HALF BATHS AND A TWO-CAR GARAGE. ON THE FIRST LEVEL YOU WILL FIND AN OFFICE, FORMAL LIVING ROOM, FORMAL DINING ROOM, HALF BATH, FAMILY ROOM WITH A FIREPLACE AND AN EAT IN KITCHEN LEADING TO A SUNROOM WITH ACCESS TO THE DECK. THE LAUNDRY ROOM IS ALSO LOCATED ON THIS LEVEL. ON THE SECOND LEVEL IS THE PRIMARY BEDROOM WITH ENSUITE BATH, THREE ADDITIONAL BEDROOMS AND A FULL BATH IN THE HALLWAY. THE LOWER LEVEL HAS A FAMILY ROOM WITH A FULL BATH, PLENTY OF STORAGE AND A WALK OUT SLIDING GLASS DOOR LEADING TO A PRIVATE ENCLOSED BACK PATIO. THIS IS AN ESTATE SALE AND THE SELLER IS VERY MOTIVATED AND LOOKING AT ALL OFFERS. PRICE HAS RECENTLY BEEN REDUCED.

Private cul-de-sac setting, an expansive fenced backyard, and major system updates already completed make this home stand out from the start. This 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers bright, oversized living spaces throughout. The main level features a welcoming living room centered around a double-sided fireplace shared with the family room and sunroom, along with spacious dining and gathering areas designed for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen has been refreshed with painted cabinetry, updated hardware, and a newer refrigerator (2021). Outside, the custom hardscape brick patio completed in 2019 creates an ideal setup for cookouts, outdoor dining, morning coffee, or entertaining guests. The beautifully landscaped front and backyard include a sprinkler system, French drain, and an Amish-built shed (2023) for additional storage and functionality. The home also features a 418 sq ft 2-car garage. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a renovated spa-inspired bath completed in 2025 featuring a jetted tub. Additional bathrooms have also been refreshed with updated finishes, and toilets were replaced throughout the home in 2025 and 2026. The finished walkout basement provides even more flexible living space with a full bath, direct backyard access, and surround sound speakers that convey with the home, making it perfect for movie nights, game days, or a secondary recreation area. You'll appreciate the extensive list of major improvements already completed, including windows and siding replaced (2021), updated gutters with LeafGuard protection (2021), HVAC (2020), roof (2013), sliding glass basement door (2021), sprinkler system updates (2023), front door (2024), and freshly re-sanded patio surfaces (2026). Located in the Greenway Farm community, this home offers convenient access to Greenway Park, Greenway Farms Pool, Evergreen Mill amenities, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and Route 15 for easy travel throughout Loudoun County. Community amenities include outdoor pools, tennis courts, volleyball courts, and common grounds for even more outdoor enjoyment. Homes with this combination of cul-de-sac placement, lot size, privacy, and extensive updates rarely become available. Schedule your tour and experience the space, functionality, and value this Leesburg home has to offer.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

Welcome to this beautifully updated 4-bedroom single-family home tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in the highly sought-after Exeter community. Step inside to find gleaming oak hardwood floors, updated lighting, and spacious formal living and dining areas that create a warm and inviting first impression. The bright eat-in kitchen is designed for both everyday living and entertaining, featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, a large center island, and a separate walk-in pantry. Just off the kitchen, new sliding glass doors lead to a private patio, garden space, and fully fenced backyard. The adjoining family room offers a cozy retreat with newly installed hardwood flooring and a charming fireplace accent wall. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite features newer hardwood floors, a large walk-in closet, and a beautifully renovated spa-like bathroom complete with an oversized frameless glass shower. Three additional bedrooms, a full hall bath, and a convenient upper-level laundry room complete the second floor. The finished walk-up basement adds even more living space with brand-new LVP flooring, a large recreation room, abundant storage, and an additional full bathroom. Ideally located near Ida Lee Park, historic downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, and all three nearby schools. Residents of Exeter enjoy fantastic community amenities including a pool, tennis and basketball courts, parks, and scenic walking trails. Recent improvements include: Sliding Glass Door (2025),Front Door (2024),Washer & Dryer (2023) Fence (2021),Water Heater (2020), HVAC (2018)

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

OVER $80K IN RECENT UPDATES! All the expensive updates and upgrades are already done! Tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in a highly desirable non-HOA neighborhood just a 15 minute walk to downtown Leesburg, this beautifully updated home offers the perfect blend of timeless style, modern comfort, and everyday convenience. Thoughtfully renovated from top to bottom with major systems already updated, this exceptional property is truly move-in ready. From the moment you step inside, you'll appreciate the attention to detail including Coretec LVP flooring, custom trim work, updated lighting, and a beautifully updated kitchen at the heart of the home. The stunning renovated kitchen is designed to impress, featuring a large leathered granite island, gorgeous backsplash, and the perfect setup for everyday living and entertaining. Just off the kitchen, the show stopping covered deck overlooks a private, fully fenced backyard with pristine landscaping, creating the perfect outdoor retreat for morning coffee, summer gatherings, or relaxing evenings at home. Upstairs, you'll find four bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with a walk-in closet and beautifully updated bath. The three additional bedrooms share a nicely updated hall bath. The bedroom-level laundry room is a standout feature, complete with a washer/dryer tower, utility sink, and easy convenience right where you need it most. Ceiling fans in all bedrooms, newer carpet, Coretec LVP flooring throughout the upper hallway and laundry room plus an abundance of natural light complete the upper level. The finished basement offers a cozy rec room with custom built-ins, ample storage space, and a bathroom rough-in for future expansion. Additional updates provide peace of mind, including: roof (2020), water heater (2021), HVAC (2016) with new fan motor (2026), plus all new windows, front door, and sliding glass door (2023). Located just minutes from downtown Leesburg, Leesburg Premium Outlets, dining, shopping, parks, and commuter routes, this home combines beautifully updated living spaces, functional design, and an unbeatable location . All that without HOA restrictions!

WELCOME TO 314 BELMONT PLACE- Leesburg just voted #2 best place to live in VA! **WALKING DISTANCE TO DOWNTOWN LEESBURG & NEW CATOCTIN WALK / HARRISON POST Development with NEW retail and restaurants*** NO HOA, NO HISTORIC REGULATIONS. SO MUCH POTENTIAL. RARE combination of LOCATION AND MOVE IN READY CONDITION UNDER 800k! Beautifully maintained brick rambler nestled on a private 12-home cul-de-sac, just steps from the W&OD Trail and within walking distance to everything downtown Leesburg has to offer! Walkable to Catoctin Elementary and LCHS. The main level features 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full baths. An updated kitchen seamlessly connects the dining room, flexible informal living space, and a large, light-filled family room. Two sliding glass doors open to the patio and backyard-perfect for effortless indoor-outdoor entertaining. The lower level offers a cozy family room ideal for a home office, playroom, or media space, complete with built-in bookshelves. You'll also find two bonus rooms, a full bath, and abundant storage in the unfinished area. A 2-car garage plus a 10x14 shed provide excellent storage options. The fully fenced, flat backyard completes this exceptional property-offering privacy, space, and versatility.

Welcome to 408 Cherry Lane - a fully renovated three-level home offering the look and feel of new construction in the heart of Leesburg. This stunning home features 4 bedrooms and 5 fully renovated bathrooms, with every element of the interior completely brand new from top to bottom. Situated on a private, fully fenced 0.38-acre lot, the property boasts a level backyard and a brand-new paved driveway with dual garage doors equipped with upgraded belt-drive motors, new remotes, and keypads. The exterior showcases all new Low-E argon vinyl windows, PVC trim, a new fiberglass front door, French patio door, LED lighting, a Ring doorbell, and an expansive 30' x 16' Trex double-deck overlooking refreshed landscaping with new sod and plantings. Inside, the home is completely transformed with luxury vinyl plank flooring, fresh paint, upgraded trim, and all interior doors replaced with custom doors and upgraded hardware, along with a stunning chef's kitchen featuring new cabinetry with custom crown molding, a large island, quartz countertops with waterfall edge, tile backsplash, and brand-new Samsung stainless steel appliances. All five bathrooms are fully remodeled with high-end finishes and custom tile work. Additional home upgrades include 48 recessed LED lights, new ceiling fans, updated electrical throughout, a brand-new 200-amp panel, new American Standard HVAC system, water heater, sump pump, washer and dryer, and an epoxy-finished garage floor. Ideally located in a well-established, no-HOA community with access to trails and within walking distance to shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, this home offers unbeatable proximity to Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, and major commuter routes including Route 7 and Route 15, all within a highly sought-after school district.

Beautifully renovated and thoughtfully designed for comfort and convenience, this spacious 3-bedroom, 3 full bath home offers true one-level living in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Situated on a large corner lot, the home features hardwood floors throughout the main level, fresh paint, and new carpet in all bedrooms. Each bedroom includes custom closet built-ins for added organization and functionality. The layout is ideal for a variety of needs, including potential handicap accessibility with a roll-in shower. The updated kitchen is equipped with stove, a new microwave, and plenty of space for cooking and gathering. Step outside to enjoy the brand new Trex deck and freshly landscaped yard-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Additional upgrades include a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an extra-deep two-car garage offering ample storage. The fully finished basement expands your living space with a potential additional bedroom and a separate outside entrance-ideal for a future in-law suite, studio, home office, or rental opportunity. Conveniently located near shopping, commuter routes, schools, parks, and scenic trails, this move-in ready home offers flexibility, modern updates, and a prime location all in one.

Escape to your own private sanctuary in the heart of Tavistock Farms with this stunningly updated five-bedroom home on a premium lot that backs directly to a lush, wooded common area. The main level offers a perfect balance of work and play, featuring a secluded home office with navy accent walls for those who work from home. The back of the house opens up into a massively open kitchen and family room combo that serves as the true heart of the home. This 2022 kitchen renovation is a knockout, featuring a massive white-veined stone island, high-end stainless steel appliances, and custom two-tone cabinetry. It flows directly into the family room, which is anchored by a stone fireplace and a custom live-edge mantle, with a wall of windows that brings the forest views inside. The thoughtful floor plan provides four generous bedrooms on the upper level, including a primary retreat with a dedicated sitting room and spa-like bath. A true standout feature is the fully finished, walk-out lower level, which is expertly designed for multi-generational living or a high-end guest suite. This self-contained space includes a private fifth bedroom with a full-sized window, a full bath, and its own complete second kitchen and breakfast bar-allowing for total independence and comfort. Your outdoor space is built for total privacy, featuring a sprawling rear deck with a gazebo and tea lights, all enclosed in a fully fenced yard where the only neighbors behind you are the trees. This home is completely move-in ready with every major system recently replaced, including a new roof and gutters (2022), high-efficiency HVAC with a UV air filter (2020), and a new water heater (2020). Beyond the property line, the highly sought-after Tavistock Farms community offers a premier lifestyle with an active clubhouse, a swimming pool, and miles of scenic walking trails. You are perfectly positioned just minutes from the charm of historic downtown Leesburg's dining and boutique shopping, while enjoying immediate access to the Dulles Greenway and Route 7 for an easy commute.

Opportunity is knocking *****LOOKING FOR A Place to build your own SWEAT Equity???Are you a DIY Person???? DO you LOVE to renovate and live in your own Reno??????This is The perfect Opportunity- ESPECIALLY if you want to leave a little bit of history / Vintage - LOOK No Further !!!!!**** This charming place has a throwback in time feel with original kitchen, baths and floors*****All Brick Rambler with a finished Lower Level ****Offers flexibility in the floor plan*****Two Wood Burning Fireplaces**** Hardwood Floors *****Covered Back Patio ******Includes an attached garagePLUS a detached garage with WORKSHOP and two sheds *- this could work well with all of your DIY projects***The Detached Garage could be for that Car Lover & or Hobbyist!!!! A Niche Property & a Great Opportunity - SOOOOOOOOOOO Close to Downtown Leesburg - minutes from all the shopping, restaurants, parks, trails, wine & beer venues, recreation and so much more !!!! Home can be sold by itself although another Rambler next door could make this an interesting Multi Generational Living Lifestyle - just in separate houses- contact agent for information for potential purchase ****Vacant lot for sale too****** Oh the Possibilities !!! Renovation Potential/Work Shop Potential / Hobbyist / Car Lover ******NO HOA******Rare Find on almost an acre!!!!!!

Come home to a place that instantly calms your mind with it's expansive serene backyard views. This one of a kind lot will not disappoint with open views and perfect walking distance to downtown Leesburg and Ida Lee Rec Center. This stunning renovated Colonial home in the desirable Exeter community boasts three levels of excellent living space, featuring 3 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. All major updates include windows(2021), roof(2013), HVAC(2020) and siding(2021). The gourmet kitchen, complete with a pantry, new quartz countertops and updated appliances, flows seamlessly into the family room, perfect for entertaining. Enjoy brand new luxury laminate plank and ceramic tile flooring throughout, along with energy-efficient windows and a cozy wood fireplace. Recent renovations in 2024-2025 enhance the property's appeal, while the fully finished daylight basement offers additional living space with custom wood bar, kitchenette, and bedroom/office design. The exterior features include a deck, hot tub, and enclosed storage all set against a backdrop of endless open space views. Community amenities include a pool, basketball courts, and playgrounds, fostering a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere. Conveniently located within walking distance to schools, parks, and beautiful downtown Leesburg , this home offers both comfort and community engagement. With ample parking and a well-maintained yard, this property is a perfect blend of style and functionality.

GORGEOUS 5 BEDROOM 3.5 BATH SINGLE FAMILY HOME IN SOUGHT AFTER TAVISTOCK FARMS - COMPLETELY REMODELED HOME WITH NEW CUSTOM KITCHEN CABINETS, NEW QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS, NEW LG STAINLESS STEEL APPLIANCES, NEW TILE BACKSPLASH, NEW SINK, DISPOSAL AND FAUCET - NEW LUXURY VINYL FLOORING ON ENTIRE MAIN LEVEL - ALL 3.5 BATHROOMS COMPLETELY REMODELED WITH NEW TILE, NEW VANITIES, NEW FAUCETS, NEW TOILETS, NEW MIRRORS AND FIXTURES - NEW CARPET ON UPPER AND LOWER LEVELS - FRESHLY PAINTED THROUGHOUT - FRESHLY STAINED REAR DECK BACKING TO PRIVATE WOODED LOT - FULLY FINISHED WALKOUT BASEMENT WITH FULL BATHROOM, BEDROOM AND STORAGE - LARGE MAIN LEVEL PRIMARY BEDROOM WITH LUXURY BATH AND 2 WALKIN CLOSETS - NEW HVAC AND TANKLESS HOT WATER HEATER 2024 - NEW ROOF 2022 -

Welcome to 107 Appletree Dr NE, a spacious and beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath colonial nestled in the established NON HOA Carrvale community of historic Leesburg. Situated on a flat and usable .24-acre lot with mature trees and a fully fenced backyard, this three-level home offers the perfect blend of comfort, charm, and convenience. Inside, you'll find an updated kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances including a new stove, ample cabinetry, and flows seamlessly into the bright and inviting 3-season sunroom overlooking the backyard. Step outside to the spacious deck and private fenced yard-perfect for entertaining, pets, gardening, or relaxing evenings outdoors. The fully finished walk-up basement adds incredible flexibility with a den, kitchenette, laundry room with a new washer, and direct access to the backyard, making it ideal for guests, multi-generational living, a home office, gym, or recreation space. Major updates include a newer HVAC system, Water Filtration System ($9,000 Value) and a 30-year architectural roof installed in 2016, offering peace of mind for years to come. The oversized 2-car garage and three finished levels provide abundant storage and functional living space for today's lifestyle. Located in the desirable Carrvale neighborhood, residents enjoy a quiet, tree-lined setting just minutes from everything Leesburg has to offer. Conveniently close to historic downtown Leesburg featuring award-winning restaurants, breweries, coffee shops, boutiques, and year-round community events. Nearby shopping includes Leesburg Premium Outlets, Village at Leesburg, grocery stores, fitness centers, and everyday conveniences. Outdoor enthusiasts will love proximity to Ida Lee Park & Recreation Center, the W&OD Trail, local wineries and breweries, parks, and scenic Loudoun County attractions. Commuters will appreciate quick access to Route 7, Route 15, the Dulles Greenway, and Dulles International Airport. This home combines classic colonial charm, functional living space, thoughtful updates, and an unbeatable location in one of Loudoun County's most sought-after communities. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own in the heart of Leesburg!

listings.address: 405 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: PRICE ADJUSTMENT, AMAZING, UNDER $900,000 FOR AN IN-TOWN HOME!!! SELLERS FOUND THEIR NEXT HOME AND ARE READY TO FIND NEW OWNERS FOR THEIR BEAUTIFUL HOME. Built in 1949 and completely renovated and remodeled in 2019, this stunning home perfectly blends timeless character with modern style and convenience. Situated on over a quarter-acre lot within walking distance of historic downtown Leesburg, this property offers the rare opportunity to enjoy the highly sought-after lifestyle of strolling to local restaurants, boutiques, coffee shops, and the many festivals and community events that make this charming town so special. Featuring an efficient floor plan with 4 bedrooms and 3.5 beautifully updated bathrooms, the home was thoughtfully redesigned with both comfort and entertaining in mind. The inviting open floor plan creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere centered around a lovely kitchen with black granite countertops, open shelving, ample cabinet space, and stylish finishes. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the family room and opens directly onto a large entertaining deck, making indoor-outdoor gatherings effortless. One of the home's most memorable features is the expansive wraparound porch - the perfect place to relax with morning coffee, unwind in the evenings, or host family and friends. It's easy to imagine this becoming the favorite gathering spot for celebrations, holidays, and casual weekends alike. The original fireplace was recently redesigned and updated. The property itself is equally impressive, with mature landscaping that provides beauty and privacy throughout the seasons. Outdoor features include a garden area, charming greenhouse, and play set, creating a backyard that is both functional and picturesque. Additional custom touches throughout the home reflect the builder's attention to detail, including a few distinctive German windows that enhance both the home's character and energy efficiency. This is more than just a house - it's a lifestyle opportunity in one of Northern Virginia's most beloved historic communities. OPEN HOUSE SATURDAY AND SUNDAY! COME ON BY, YOU WILL FALL FOR THIS ONE!

PRICE IMPROVEMENT! Now Offered at $939,900. Seller Offering Up to $10,000 Toward Buyer's Closing Costs (subject to contract terms and lender approval). Welcome Home to 41726 Stumptown Rd, Leesburg, VA 20176. Nestled on 5.05 private acres, this spacious and versatile property offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and convenience. Boasting over 4,380 finished square feet, this home features 4+ bedrooms and 4 full bathrooms, providing ample space for everyday living and entertaining. Inside, you'll find multiple living areas highlighted by two fireplaces and two wood stoves, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout. The expansive layout offers flexibility for multi-generational living, work-from-home setups, or guest accommodations. Enjoy the outdoors from the large front, side, and rear porches, perfect for relaxing and taking in the scenic surroundings. The property also features an in-ground swimming pool with hot tub, ideal for summer entertaining. Additional highlights include a detached apartment-perfect for guests, rental income, or private office space-and a 1-car garage. Conveniently located just minutes from shopping, grocery stores, local amenities, and Dulles International Airport, this property offers peaceful country living without sacrificing accessibility.

Welcome to this beautifully updated, move-in-ready home in sought-after Leesburg, VA! Nestled on a level lot with lovely mature landscaping, this well-maintained property offers the perfect blend of comfort, quality updates, and easy living. Note: 1848 SQ FT finished living space! (Tax record doesn't count the lower level, but it doesn't feel like a basement at all!) You'll find all new kitchen stainless steel appliances, hardwood floors installed in 2013 in fantastic condition, brand new carpet and fresh paint throughout in 2026, along with new bathroom tile floors in 2026 - truly turnkey and ready for its next owners. ** Major updates include a 50-year roof installed in 2016 for long-term peace of mind. This home is ideal for buyers seeking low-maintenance living, updated features, and beautiful outdoor space in a prime Loudoun County location. ** Convenient (5 minutes!) to historic downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and top-rated schools, this charming home is a must-see and absolutely worth a visit! ** OPEN HOUSE Saturday, May 23rd, 1:00-3:00 PM

Tucked away on a premium homesite backing to mature trees, this beautifully updated Kingston II model offers over 4,800 square feet of finished living space, exceptional indoor-outdoor entertaining areas, and one of the newer homes in Leesburg's desirable Elysian Heights community. Built by Beazer Homes in 2014, this residence features 5 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a thoughtfully designed floor plan that combines spacious gathering areas with comfortable everyday living. The well-appointed kitchen offers granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, upgraded lighting, and abundant workspace for meal preparation and entertaining. One of the home's most impressive features is the custom outdoor living space added in 2021. Designed as a seamless extension of the home, the expansive deck and screened porch provide the perfect setting for outdoor dining, entertaining, or simply relaxing while enjoying the peaceful wooded backdrop. Anchored by a stone wall showcasing an outdoor flat screen TV, the screened porch creates a cozy, inviting atmosphere that can be enjoyed throughout multiple seasons. The finished walkout lower level adds tremendous flexibility and includes a legal bedroom, full bathroom, kitchenette area, generous storage space, and direct access to the backyard-ideal for guests, multi-generational living, an au pair suite, or extended stays.
